typography: handwritten script headers with clean body
hero_layout: card-style — hero content inside a floating card/panel
nav_style: hamburger menu icon only (even on desktop)
scroll_animation: moderate — staggered entrance of cards and elements
hover_effects: expressive — tilt, glow, border animations, underline slides
contact_style: map-themed — as if marking your location
quirk: contact section looks like a terminal / command line
